title: lithospermum suffruticosum
intro: Lithospermum suffruticosum, also known as Rocky Mountain gromwell, is a perennial herb in the borage family native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to its rich content of lithospermic acid and other bioactive compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Lithospermum suffruticosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
